About the only thing 1t appears that

into small and anguished seq
mente.


AFTER MALoNv TOO


Then the council listened to the
committees report on Thomas Ma
lony, member of the federal union
charged with violating the city
wage scale. The trades council
took precisely the same view of the
case as did The Press a few days
ago when it first told the town of
Malony's stunts. So without a dis
senting vote the council ordered
the union of which Maloney is q
member to investigate the charges
to take the proper action if they
proved true. and the council also
recommended that contractors and
sub contractors be made ineligible
to membership in federal unions,
